name: odrl-permission-domain-range-declared
query: PREFIX odrl: <http://www.w3.org/ns/odrl/2/> ASK WHERE { odrl:permission <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#domain> odrl:Policy ; <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#range> odrl:Permission }

name: odrl-assignee-subproperty-of-function
query: PREFIX odrl: <http://www.w3.org/ns/odrl/2/> ASK WHERE { odrl:assignee <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> odrl:function }
